data.title: Boat Trader expands AI with natural language and image search
data.description: Since it launches its new AI-powered search, Boat Trader has seen a 5% increase in lead conversion across its platform.

data.title: Report: AI and cybersecurity will drive IT market growth
data.description: 70% of executives said they face difficulties hiring skilled workers, particularly for AI, data analytics, and cybersecurity projects.

data.title: Aldi joins Uber Eats platform for grocery delivery nationwide
data.description: The grocer joins Best Buy, Dollar Tree, Sephora and DSW in joining Uber Eats since August and became the first to accept SNAP-EBT at launch.

data.title: Walmart adds refrigerated pharmacy items for same-day delivery
data.description: It is now offering medications including in insulin, glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1, an example of which is Ozempic) and pediatric amoxicillin for same-day pharmacy delivery across the United States, Walmart announced.

data.title: GrubMarket expands with an AI reporting agent for food distributors
data.description: The AI agent is designed to automate the process of generating business reports that food wholesalers and distributors typically pull manually from enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems.
